category_sources: Official homepage describes vsftpd as an FTP server for UNIX-like systems.
source_facts.description says vsftpd is a secure FTP server for UNIX.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and text use vsftpd.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes online source/docs and links the manual page for config options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty and official source is distributed as tarballs; no official source-control repository URL was identified on the official homepage.
tags_sources: Official homepage emphasizes security, performance, stability, SSL, IPv6, and FTP server features.
source_facts.description says secure FTP server for UNIX.
